extensionDescription.message: Select items from supported anime BT source pages, resolve the real download links, and send them to the current downloader in one batch.

container.loadError: Failed to load popup state. Please retry.
container.actionError: The action failed. Please try again later.
container.disableBlockedWhileRunning: A batch is currently running on this page, so this site cannot be disabled yet.

status.batchRunningHint: A batch is currently running. Wait for it to finish before disabling this site.

checking.title: Checking downloader connection
checking.description: Verifying whether the current downloader $1 is available. When the check finishes, the popup will either confirm batch sending is ready or direct you to the configuration page.

failed.title: Downloader connection failed
failed.description: This page is ready, but the extension cannot connect to $1 right now. Check the endpoint, credentials, or whether the target client is running.

unsupported.title: This page is not supported for batch download
unsupported.description: The extension is inactive on this website. Open one of the supported anime BT sites below to use batch download.

siteDisabled.title: This site is disabled
siteDisabled.description: $1 is disabled in the extension. Re-enable it to show the batch panel and selection checkboxes on the page.

ready.title: Extension is ready
ready.description: This page is supported. Use the batch panel in the bottom-right corner to select and send torrents quickly.

emptyState.noEnabledFilters: No filters are enabled for this site. Everything will be kept by default.
emptyState.noEffectiveFilters: No effective filters are loaded for this site. Everything will be kept by default.

advanced.savePathPlaceholder: Leave blank to use the default path
advanced.savePathHintDefault: Leave this empty to use the downloader default directory. For remote downloaders, enter an absolute path recognized by the target host.

validation.filterMustConditionRequired: Add at least one required condition

status.validationError: Please fix the validation errors in the form first.

general.label: Downloader & Basic Settings
general.title: Downloader & Basic Settings
general.description: Choose the active downloader, configure the connection, and adjust the global extraction cadence.

sites.label: Sites
sites.title: Sites
sites.description: Manage enablement and site-specific options for all four supported sites in one place.

filters.label: Filters
filters.title: Filters
filters.description: Keep only items that match your filters so batch submission stays aligned with real usage.

history.label: History
history.title: History
history.description: Review previous batch submissions and trace statuses and failure reasons.

overview.label: Overview
overview.title: Overview
overview.description: Review the supported sites and jump to them quickly.

downloaderSelector.title: Downloader selection
downloaderSelector.description: Choose the downloader you currently use before editing its connection settings.
downloaderSelector.qbDescription: Test the qBittorrent WebUI connection and submit magnet links, torrent URLs, or torrent files.
downloaderSelector.transmissionDescription: Test the Transmission RPC connection and submit magnet links, torrent URLs, or torrent files.

qb.title: qBittorrent settings
qb.description: Configure the WebUI endpoint and credentials used for connection testing and submissions.

transmission.title: Transmission settings
transmission.description: Configure the Transmission RPC endpoint and credentials used for connection testing and submissions.

extractionCadence.title: Extraction cadence
extractionCadence.description: Adjust concurrency, retry count, and the inject/dom-settle wait timings.

body1.prefix: At the moment the extension only supports accessing a local downloader WebUI from the browser extension context. If qBittorrent returns 401 while the credentials are correct, first disable

body2.suffix: . Only do this when the WebUI is meant for local-only use; do not expose it to your LAN or the public internet.

deliveryMode.torrentFile: Download torrent first, then upload to qB

delivery.title: Delivery strategy
delivery.lockedDescription: This site currently uses a fixed delivery strategy and does not expose additional switching.

scriptFields.title: Script parameters
scriptFields.description: Keep the legacy script configuration so it is restored if the site is enabled again.

kisssub.summary: An anime BT site that combines seasonal listings with fansub groups.

dongmanhuayuan.summary: A BT sharing site aimed at anime fans.
dongmanhuayuan.lockedStrategyLabel: Only magnet-link delivery is currently supported
dongmanhuayuan.noteDescription: Dongmanhuayuan currently supports magnet-link extraction only and needs no extra configuration.

acgrip.summary: A clearly categorized ACG source that leans toward direct torrent download.
acgrip.noteTitle: Recommended: download the torrent, then upload it to qB
acgrip.noteDescription: qB may fail to fetch torrent URLs from this site directly.

bangumimoe.summary: A community that combines seasonal calendars with the latest torrent releases.

capabilities.0: A unified site settings page manages enablement and site-specific parameters for all four supported sources.
capabilities.1: Disabled sites stop injecting the batch UI, and background batch processing rejects requests from them as well.
capabilities.2: The overview stays as a separate page so you can review site summaries and jump to them quickly.

empty.title: No download history yet
empty.description: History records will appear here after you start a batch download

clear.title: Clear all history
clear.description: Are you sure you want to clear all history records? This cannot be undone.

deleteRecord.title: Delete history record
deleteRecord.description: Are you sure you want to delete "$1"? This cannot be undone.

retryAll.title: Retry failed items
retryAll.downloaderHint: The current downloader $1 will be used for the retry.

retryItem.title: Retry failed item
retryItem.downloaderHint: The current downloader $1 will be used for the retry.

retryErrors.noSubmissionResult: The downloader did not return a submission result
retryErrors.noUsableUrl: No usable magnet or torrent URL is available

detail.duplicateMessage: This item already exists in qBittorrent and was skipped

parse_error.label: Page parse failed
parse_error.desc: The source site structure may have changed and the torrent link could not be extracted.
parse_error.suggestion: Wait for an extension update or download it manually.

timeout.label: Detail page timed out
timeout.desc: The request to the source detail page timed out.
timeout.suggestion: Retry later or check your network connection.

qb_error.label: qB returned an error
qb_error.suggestion: Check the WebUI connection, settings, or available disk space.

network_error.label: Network error
network_error.suggestion: Check the network connection and retry.

filtered_out.label: Blocked by filters
filtered_out.desc: This item was blocked by the backend filter fallback and never entered the qBittorrent submission flow.
filtered_out.suggestion: If you want to keep it, adjust the filters and restart the batch from the source page.

filters.title: Filters
filters.description: Define only the resource traits you want to keep. Any item matching an enabled filter is kept; if no filters are enabled, everything is kept by default.
filters.listDescription: A good default is one filter per real-world scenario, for example "Ailian 1080 SC".
filters.emptyDescription: Create a filter so the extension knows which resources should be kept.
filters.cardDescription: Matching items are kept; items that match no enabled filter are blocked.

dialog.description: Edit the filter name, conditions, and enabled state
dialog.mustDescription: All of these conditions must match.
dialog.anyDescription: Optional. Matching any one of these keeps the item; it is not used to scope sites.
dialog.enableDescription: The configuration is kept when disabled, but it will not participate in real filtering.
dialog.mustConditionRequired: At least one required condition is needed

testBench.title: Quick test
testBench.description: Enter a resource title to confirm whether the current filters would keep it.
testBench.enterTitle: Enter a resource title before testing.
testBench.matchedFilter: Matched filter "$1". This resource would be kept.
testBench.acceptedByDefault: No filters are enabled, so this resource would be kept by default.
testBench.blockedSummary: No enabled filter matched, so this resource would be blocked.

checkbox.label: Batch
checkbox.selectTitle: Select this post for batch download
checkbox.unmatchedRule: This item does not match the active filters and cannot be selected

status.ready: Ready. Select items on the page first.
status.readyWithSelection: $1 item(s) selected and ready to send.
status.startWithPath: Starting $1 item(s). The downloader will be asked to save them to $2.
status.startDefaultPath: Starting $1 item(s). The downloader default directory will be used.
status.startFailed: Failed to start the batch download task.
status.preparingWithCustomPath: Preparing $1 item(s). They will be sent to the custom path shortly.
status.preparingWithDefaultPath: Preparing $1 item(s). They will be sent to the downloader default directory shortly.
status.submittingPrepared: Submitting to qBittorrent. $1 item(s) are queued.
status.completed: Done. Submitted $1 item(s), skipped $2 duplicate(s), failed $3 item(s).
status.savePathHint: The downloader will be asked to save this batch to: $1
status.progressFailed: Processed $1/$2 item(s). Some resources failed to resolve.
status.progressDuplicate: Processed $1/$2 item(s). Duplicate resources were detected.
